error_signature: Issue validating invite token. Invalid request
title: User invitation links fail due to empty account First Name
symptom: When trying to invite users to a new n8n account, the invite links result in an error stating 'Issue validating invite token. Invalid request'. This occurs even for users who have never used n8n before.
not_this_if: Error does not occur during user invitation
root_cause: The error occurs because the account's First Name field is empty, which is a mandatory field for the invitation process. This prevents the system from validating the invite token correctly.
fix_steps: Fill in the First Name field
Try sending the invite links again
agent_instruction: Fill in the First Name field in your account settings and resend the invites.
